title: Junior Investment Banker at HDFC Ergo Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Junior Investment Banker at HDFC Ergo Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with HDFC Ergo Digital Technologies! We are hiring a Investment Banker for our Lucknow team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About HDFC Ergo Digital Technologies:
HDFC Ergo Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HDFC Ergo Digital Technologies!
